sl  local_address rem_address   st tx_queue rx_queue tr tm->when retrnsmt   uid  timeout inode
  0: 00000000:0050 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000   1001        0 11111 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
  1: 0100007F:0050 0200007F:1F90 01 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000   1002        0 22222 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
